/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-gcc -mcpu=cortex-m3 -mthumb -T /home/ulipe/fun/KalangoRTOS/platforms/qemu/cortexm3/linker.ld -nostartfiles -specs=nosys.specs -Wl,--gc-sections
